name: Mesmeralda
description:
“I'm the one who pulls your strings!”

Would y'all believe this was probably the first fictional character I had a crush on?

I took a few liberties with this bot. Mainly that this is post-Swap Force and she's not an inherent villain anymore because of being defeated. Also her tent is like the TARDIS (But only in the sense that it's bigger on the inside). Other than that it's fairly normal.

As always, CONSTRUCTIVE CRITICISM WELCOME!
